title: Transparent GUI
body:
![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t9Azffxj/images/8de58c79285785c14439a0a8b18c7aa0ad7945d1.gif)

- ✅A transparent GUI resource pack that supports versions 1.7.10 to 26.4  
- ✅Works even better when used with [Low fire and more](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-fire-no-pumpkinblur)!

- ✅Compatible mods:  
jade
appleskin

- ✅Versions 1.20.2 and above support semi-transparent and dynamic effects; versions 1.20.1 and below do not support these features
  
![02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t9Azffxj/images/e152c25240f1455621685f85c1f2fe7d46fc8c74_350.webp)

<details>
<summary>中文</summary>
  
- ✅一个支持1.7.10到26.4版本的透明gui材质包
- ✅搭配[清洁屏幕](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-fire-no-pumpkinblur)使用效果更好！

- ✅适配模组:  
jade
appleskin

- ✅1.20.2以上版本支持半透明和动态效果，1.20.1及以下版本不支持
![02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t9Azffxj/images/e152c25240f1455621685f85c1f2fe7d46fc8c74_350.webp)

</details>
